timeline.notes: Single persisted device-connection event for this vehicle; dedupBucket present
Snapshot polling continued within ~22s; telemetry pipeline did not stop
Expected per ops config (plug-in webhook disabled 2026-07-08); no snapshot-to-event intake exists
lastSeenAt fresh; DIMO connectionStatus CONNECTED; snapshot plug signal true

preliminaryRootCause: openUnpluggedEpisode is derived exclusively from persisted webhook event sequence. Snapshot recovery (obdIsPluggedIn + CONNECTED + fresh lastSeenAt) does not synthesize episode closure or PLUGGED_IN evidence rows.
agreedRuleGap: Business rule: unplug webhook then resumed real telemetry should auto-close open unplug episode without mandatory plug webhook. Code: reconcile anchor only suppresses phantom PLUG events; it never closes an open UNPLUG episode from snapshot telemetry.
